result.summary: Found 2 issues: a major text truncation in navigation and a major counter/content mismatch in the Exclusive Games section.

issues.description: Navigation menu shows 'Hot Gar' which appears to be truncated text, likely should be 'Hot Games' or similar
issues.suggestion: Fix the text display to show the complete word. Check if there's a layout constraint cutting off the text or if the navigation item needs adjustment.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section displays '0 Games' in the counter, but there are 6 exclusive game cards clearly visible below it (Unusual Suspects, Stomping Gold, Magni Phon, The Lot, Pickaxe Payday, Munc Maj)
issues.suggestion: Update the counter to accurately reflect the number of games displayed. Either change '0 Games' to '6 Games' or ensure the data binding is correct to dynamically count the displayed games.
